about.title: About AgriTrade
about.subtitle: The bridge connecting global farm machinery markets
about.missionText: Making global used farm machinery trading more transparent, efficient, and secure. Through AI valuation, cross-border arbitrage analysis, and one-stop logistics services, we help buyers and sellers maximize value.
about.value1Desc: AI-powered accurate pricing eliminates information asymmetry
about.value4Desc: Discover arbitrage opportunities for mutual benefit
about.teamText: We are a team with deep expertise in the agricultural machinery industry and rich experience in international trade and technology development. Team members are from China, the US, Japan and beyond, dedicated to building the world's leading used farm machinery trading platform.

arbitrageCalculator.title: Cross-border Arbitrage Calculator
arbitrageCalculator.description: Calculate cross-border arbitrage opportunities for used farm machinery, considering shipping costs, tariffs, insurance, and other expenses to help you discover the best investment opportunities. Our smart calculator automatically retrieves product information from the database and provides detailed profit analysis and risk assessment.
arbitrageCalculator.howToUseTitle: How to Use the Arbitrage Calculator
arbitrageCalculator.step1: Select a product from the list
arbitrageCalculator.step2: Domestic and international market prices will be automatically filled
arbitrageCalculator.step3: Adjust shipping costs, tariffs, insurance, and other parameters for more accurate estimates
arbitrageCalculator.step4: Click "Calculate Arbitrage Opportunity" to view detailed profit analysis and risk assessment

arbitrageTop.title: Arbitrage Rankings
arbitrageTop.description: View rankings of farm machinery products with the highest arbitrage opportunities. Discover the best investment choices for cross-border trading. We calculate arbitrage scores based on China-international price differences, shipping costs, tariffs, and other factors to recommend the most valuable products.
arbitrageTop.noDataHint: Please try again later or check if international price data has been imported
arbitrageTop.loadError: Failed to load data, please refresh the page
arbitrageTop.explanation2: Scores consider price difference, profit margin, risk assessment and policy factors
arbitrageTop.explanation3: High opportunity: Profit margin >30%, manageable risk, strongly recommended
arbitrageTop.explanation4: Medium opportunity: Profit margin 15-30%, monitor risk, cautious investment
arbitrageTop.explanation5: Low opportunity: Profit margin <15% or higher risk, research recommended
arbitrageTop.priceTrendDesc: Showing domestic vs international price trends for {productName} to help you time your purchase.
arbitrageTop.note: Note: Rankings are based on latest international prices and real-time exchange rates. Calculations are for reference only. Please consider shipping, tariffs, insurance, and other costs in actual transactions.
